sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Themistius</hi> Sophista [Them.] <date TEIform="date">iv A.D.</date> <title_ TEIform="title">in APo. = Aristotelis Analyticorum Posteriorum paraphrasis,</title_> ed. M. Wallies (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> v <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> i), Berlin 1900. <title_ TEIform="title">in APr. = in Aristotelis Analyticorum Priorum librum I para- phrasis,</title_> ed. M. Wallies (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xxiii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> iii), Berlin 1884. <title_ TEIform="title">in de An. = inlibros Aristotelis de Anima paraphrasis,</title_> ed. R. Heinze (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> v <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> iii), Berlin 1899. <title_ TEIform="title">in Ph. = in Aristotelis Physica paraphrasis,</title_> ed. H. Schenkl (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> v <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> ii), Berlin 1900. <title_ TEIform="title">in PN = Themistii (Sophoniae) in Parva Naturalia commentarium,</title_> ed. P. Wendland (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> v <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> vi), Berlin 1903. <title_ TEIform="title">Or. = Orationes,</title_> ed. W. Dindorf, Leipzig 1832; cited by page of Hardouin.</item>
